title: Pre-Trial Authority Publication And Host-Mirror Sync
objective: Publish the post-010, post-011, and post-012 closure and planning authority set through `C:/APEX Platform`, then synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the resulting governing commit so any later host-side trial execution runs against the current closure and planning authority rather than an older host-mirror snapshot.
dependency_note: Packet 012 concludes that host-side trial execution should not start until the newer Packet 010, Packet 011, and Packet 012 closure and planning authority set is also published and synchronized to `/home/olares/code/apex`.
required_inputs: The Packet 012 ruling that a small authority publication and host-mirror sync step should occur before any host-side trial execution
The current workstation-local Packet 010 closure, Packet 011 reassessment, Packet 012 planning handoff, and associated routing and roadmap updates
The governing parent-root publication boundary at `C:/APEX Platform`
The prepared host parent-root mirror at `/home/olares/code/apex`
constrained_outputs: A dated execution handoff recording the bounded publication scope, resulting governing commit, and post-sync host-mirror evidence for the newer closure and planning authority set
A recorded statement of whether the host mirror now contains the Packet 010 closure handoff, Packet 011 reassessment handoff, Packet 012 planning handoff, and updated routing and roadmap state
No migration approval, no host runtime mutation, no old-clone mutation, and no widening into AI-services, Gitea/code-hosting, or canonical-hosting work
validation_steps: Review parent-root git status at `C:/APEX Platform` and confirm the proposed publication scope is limited to the newer Packet 010, Packet 011, and Packet 012 closure and planning authority set plus routing and roadmap updates.
Exclude unrelated parent-root changes, secrets, runtime artifacts, host-only state, service configuration changes, and implementation work outside this authority-publication lane.
Create and publish the bounded parent-root commit to the GitHub-canonical repository, recording branch, remote, included paths, and resulting commit hash.
Capture pre-sync `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, remote, commit, and cleanliness evidence without mutating `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
Synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit using a non-destructive fast-forward-only method.
Capture post-sync evidence that the host mirror now contains the Packet 010 closure handoff, Packet 011 reassessment handoff, Packet 012 planning handoff, and updated routing and roadmap state.
Stop if execution would require migration approval, host runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, service changes, auth or ingress changes, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, or canonical-hosting change.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes bounded authority publication and host-mirror synchronization only. It does not authorize database writes, host-runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, or migration approval.
closure_note: Not yet executed. This packet exists because Packet 012 concluded that a host-side trial should not start until the newer closure and planning authority set is also published and synchronized to `/home/olares/code/apex`.
next_action: Execute this packet only as a bounded authority-publication and host-mirror synchronization lane. Do not treat it as migration approval or as authorization for host runtime mutation.
